issue.title: www.mmo-champion.com

labels.name: T: Anti Adblock Script
labels.description: The site detects ad blocking

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

<details>
<summary>Detailed description for iOS users</summary>

1. Install [**Usercripts**](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/userscripts/id1463298887) app
2. Enable **Usercripts** extension in Safari settings
	* iOS 18+: `System settings` => `Apps` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	* iOS 17 and older: `System settings` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	Find **Usercripts**, enable it and allow `On other sites` permission
3. Open the [tinyShield ](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@filteringdev/tinyshield@latest/dist/tinyShield.user.js) userscript URL in browser
4. Press the extensions icon in the address bar of Safari and select Userscripts 
5. Tap to install
6. In opened popup, scroll down and press Install button
7. Done.

</details>

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

pinned_comment.body:
Adguard 브라우저 확장 프로그램 MV3을 사용하시고 숲 광고 차단이 안되는 분들께:
해당 이슈는 최근 변경 사항 ( https://github.com/List-KR/List-KR/commit/29e530df948a1054fba818a1917992c80c3b2d04 )이 Adguard 브라우저 확장 MV3에 아직 적용되지 않아서 발생한 현상입니다.
따라서, Adguard 브라우저 확장 MV3를 사용하시는 분들은 아래 방법을 따라주시기 바랍니다:
 1. 각 브라우저의 웹 확장 프로그램 관리 페이지에 들어갑니다. (예: `chrome://extensions/`)
 2. Adguard 브라우저 확장 프로그램의 디테일 버튼을 선택합니다.
 3. 사용자 스크립트 권한을 부여합니다.
 4. 브라우저 툴바에 있는 Adguard 브라우저 확장 프로그램을 클릭하고 필터 리스트 업데이트 버튼을 누릅니다.
 5. 숲 웹 페이지를 새로고침합니다.
 6. 그럼에도 해결되지 않으면 다음 정식 Adguard 브라우저 확장 MV3의 릴리즈 시기까지 기다리시고 확장 프로그램 자체를 업데이트하셔야 합니다.

이러한 번거러움은 Google의 정책에서 비롯되었습니다.

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
As far as I understand, to reproduce popunder in mobile view it's necessary to use a different browser than Chrome and click/tap twice. The rule below seems to works fine on my end:
```adblock
porndig.com#%#//scriptlet('set-constant', 'tkn_common.promo_tool', 'emptyObj')
```

issue.title: blog.livedoor.jp

labels.name: T: Anti Adblock Script
labels.description: The site detects ad blocking

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

<details>
<summary>Detailed description for iOS users</summary>

1. Install [**Usercripts**](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/userscripts/id1463298887) app
2. Enable **Usercripts** extension in Safari settings
	* iOS 18+: `System settings` => `Apps` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	* iOS 17 and older: `System settings` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	Find **Usercripts**, enable it and allow `On other sites` permission
4. Open the [tinyShield ](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@filteringdev/tinyshield@latest/dist/tinyShield.user.js) userscript URL in browser
5. Press the extensions icon in the address bar of Safari and select Userscripts 
6. Tap to install
7. In opened popup, scroll down and press Install button
8. Done.

</details>

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

### Issue URL (Annoyance) [https://www.thetrainline.com/en-us](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.thetrainline.com%2Fen-us) ### Comment > When using the site thetrainline.com, they have a Booking.com partner checkbox that is checked by default, and when you do a train search it will open a new tab with a booking.com search. It's forced into your browsing experience. I have created a tampermonkey userscript to uncheck this but it would be better to completely remove this annoyance ``` Username: @paulverbeke ``` ### Screenshots

comment.body:
> So if I understood correctly it will not be included in uBO ?

As I recall, trusted scriptlets can only be used in trusted filters, which differ between AdGuard and uBO. Choose whatever you like best.
You can use this for uBO.
```adblock
thetrainline.com##+js(trusted-click-element, form[name="search-form"] div > input[id="bookingPromo"][type="checkbox"], , 500)
```

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://lkfl2.nalog.ru/lkfl](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Flkfl2.nalog.ru%2Flkfl)

### Comment
> Добрый день!
> При использовании DNS 94.140.14.14, 94.140.15.15 не работает личный кабинет ФНС России,
> например, https://lkfl2.nalog.ru/lkfl.
> И, соответственно, их мобильное приложение.
> Проверьте, пожалуйста.
> Переключил на 14.140, 14.141 - тоже не работает.
> Пока пришлось вернуться на DNS провайдера.
> 
> Поддержка решить вопрос не смогла: 
> 
> Здравствуйте!
> 
> Со своей стороны блокировки не видим:
>  
> 
> 
> Сообщите об этой проблеме вот так, пожалуйста: https://reports.adguard.com/ru/new_issue.html. Наши разработчики фильтров ещё проверят у себя.
>  
> Сообщите, если есть другие вопросы или нужна помощь 🙏️

comment.body:
Это проблема в серверах имён самого nalog.ru: внешние серверы крупных DNS провайдеров просто не могут к ним подключиться: https://community.cloudflare.com/t/servfail-while-resolving-lkfl2-nalog-ru-via-1-1-1-1-1-1-1-2-1-0-0-2-etc/860407.

Сегодня анализ DNS propagation показывает незначительное улучшение: несколько DNS провайдеров на пределами России начали получать информацию по домену. До этого больше недели IP определялся только на сервере яндекса.
https://dnschecker.org/#A/lkfl2.nalog.ru
